name: git_ops
description: Perform common git operations: diff, diff-tail, status, log, add, commit, checkout, stash, show, summary, and cleanup.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Action: diff, diff-tail, status, log, add, commit, checkout, stash, show, summary, or cleanup

parameters.name: args
parameters.description: Additional arguments for the action; show supports --head=N, --grep=PATTERN, --lines=N-M to filter output

examples.expected: First 10 lines matching ClassName from file.go in HEAD

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces multiple separate git commands, and show --grep/--lines replaces git-show-piped-to-grep-or-sed patterns, saving 2+ steps per review.
